title: A Certain Mangaka and Their Editor
overview: Futami, a rookie mangaka, finally finished the storyboard she had been struggling with. But when sending it...

title: She's a Truly Dependable Assistant.
overview: Futami finds out that Mizuki was offered a debut and encourages her to do it, but Mizuki dodges it because...

title: I'm So Swamped, I'd Even Take Help from a Cat.
overview: Futami wants to hire another assistant, so Sato introduces a remote assistant named Nekonote.

title: It's a Job I Can't Do Alone.
overview: Futami is hit by the "pre-book release depression" every mangaka goes through.

title: My Senpai Calls Herself My Rival.
overview: Futami wants to introduce a new rival character. Then Nashida, from her assistant years, knocked on her door.

title: It's a Strange Dynamic Between the Three of Us.
overview: "Is this what it's like to cheat?" An editor from another magazine invited Futami to write a different series.

title: I Didn't See It Coming.
overview: Although Futami is satisfied with Nekonote's work, she starts to grow curious about who Nekonote is.

title: This Is Also Part of a Mangaka's Work.
overview: A serious incident occurred in the Monthly Clover's editorial department, and Futami takes on a major request.

title: A Treasure I Found on a Walk.
overview: While out walking as part of her diet, Futami comes across an abandoned puppy and takes it in.

title: Let's Take a Day Off Work for a Change.
overview: Mizuki came down with a stye and was forced to take time off from work. She wrestles with anxiety and...

title: It's Important to Actually Experience It.
overview: Nashida is getting cold feet now that the spin-off is about to fully kick off. She visits Takizawa and...

title: I'm So Glad I Kept Going! I'm So Touched.
overview: To celebrate the success of Futami, Nashida, and Nagomi's recent success, everyone gathered for a pizza party.

title: A Mangaka's Weirdly Wonderful Workplace.
overview: After the signing, Futami and Sato make their way to Futami's parents' house at Sato's request.
